name: Andrew Lloyd Webber
abstract: Andrew Lloyd Webber, Baron Lloyd-Webber (born 22 March 1948) is an English composer and impresario of musical theatre. Several of his musicals have run for more than a decade both in the West End and on Broadway.

about_quotes.speaker: Keith Ingham
about_quotes.evidence: Of course it doesn’t get the attention that Andrew Lloyd Webber’s blown up nonsense gets you know, because that’s the blockbuster stuff, right?
about_quotes.doc_title: Keith Ingham interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 12, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Luther Henderson
about_quotes.evidence: Cats or Phantom or any of the things that Andrew Lloyd has done, you know, are really spectacles.
about_quotes.doc_title: Luther Henderson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
